docs.title: Home
docs.text:
microservice-py-docker

0.10.0

Microservice with python and docker

docs.title: API
docs.text:
Api created using FastAPI. Acts as a gateway that listens for user requests, and routes them to the appropriate services.

  • Functionalities
    • create users
      • with password hashing
    • get all users
    • login
    • oath2 authentication with JWT token
    • upload file

docs.title: Database
docs.text:
Uses PostgreSQL. Stores information for the users that have been created.

  • Table
    • Users

docs.title: RabbitMQ
docs.text: Queue for messages created whenever file is uploaded

docs.title: Backend
docs.text: Server hosting consumers for the RabbitMQ files queue.

docs.title: Fileserver
docs.text: Server hosting raw files that users upload.
